") center/cover;
    }
    .album-head{
      position:relative;z-index:3;
      display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:28px;
    }
    .album-tools{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}
    .sample-stamp,.album-info{
      min-height:44px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:23px;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:#e7ded0;padding:0 16px;
      font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.13em;
    }
    .sample-stamp{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    .sample-stamp i{
      width:29px;height:29px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;
      color:#514431;background:#eedbb5;font-style:normal;
      box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(238,219,181,.08);
    }
    .sample-stamp:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
    .album-info{display:grid;place-items:center;color:#b7aea2}
    .album-shell{position:relative;z-index:2;perspective:2400px;margin:28px auto 0;max-width:1250px}
    .book{
      position:relative;
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
      min-height:590px;
      transform-style:preserve-3d;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 34px 35px rgba(0,0,0,.34));
    }
    .book:before{
      content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;top:0;bottom:0;z-index:7;
      width:24px;transform:translateX(-50%);
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(42,30,19,.3),rgba(255,255,255,.2),rgba(43,30,19,.27));
      box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(47,31,18,.24);
    }
    .book-page{
      position:relative;
      padding:31px 32px 28px;
      color:#3b3329;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 20% 15%,rgba(255,255,255,.35),transparent 34%),
        linear-gradient(138deg,#d8c5a6,#eee0c6);
      border:1px solid #ad9674;
      overflow:hidden;
      backface-visibility:hidden;
    }
    .book-page:after{
      content:"";position:absolute;inset:13px;pointer-events:none;
      border:1px solid rgba(91,66,37,.11);
    }
    .book-page.left{
      border-radius:23px 3px 3px 23px;
      background:linear-gradient(220deg,#ccb894,#eadcc1);
    }
    .book-page.right{border-radius:3px 23px 23px 3px}
    .book-page h3{
      position:relative;z-index:2;
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
      margin:0 0 20px;
      font:400 26px var(--serif);
    }
    .book-page h3 small{color:#796d5c;font:8px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.17em}
    .stamp-grid{
      position:relative;z-index:2;
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
      grid-auto-rows:145px;
      gap:20px 15px;
    }
    .stamp-slot{display:grid;place-items:center;text-align:center;min-width:0}
    .stamp-card{
      position:relative;
      max-width:128px;max-height:118px;
      border:0;padding:9px;
      background:#f1e5ca;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 7px rgba(67,48,28,.21));
      transition:.35s var(--ease);
      clip-path:polygon(0 5%,4% 5%,4% 0,10% 0,10% 5%,16% 5%,16% 0,22% 0,22% 5%,28% 5%,28% 0,34% 0,34% 5%,40% 5%,40% 0,46% 0,46% 5%,52% 5%,52% 0,58% 0,58% 5%,64% 5%,64% 0,70% 0,70% 5%,76% 5%,76% 0,82% 0,82% 5%,88% 5%,88% 0,94% 0,94% 5%,100% 5%,100% 95%,94% 95%,94% 100%,88% 100%,88% 95%,82% 95%,82% 100%,76% 100%,76% 95%,70% 95%,70% 100%,64% 100%,64% 95%,58% 95%,58% 100%,52% 100%,52% 95%,46% 95%,46% 100%,40% 100%,40% 95%,34% 95%,34% 100%,28% 100%,28% 95%,22% 95%,22% 100%,16% 100%,16% 95%,10% 95%,10% 100%,4% 100%,4% 95%,0 95%);
    }
    .stamp-card.portrait{width:92px;height:118px}
    .stamp-card.landscape{width:128px;height:91px}
    .stamp-card.square{width:106px;height:106px}
    .stamp-card.tall{width:82px;height:122px}
    .stamp-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(-1.5deg) scale(1.06);filter:drop-shadow(0 15px 12px rgba(66,46,25,.27))}
    .stamp-card img{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;object-fit:contain}
    .stamp-card.locked{background:rgba(232,217,187,.64)}
    .stamp-card.locked img{filter:grayscale(1) blur(2.2px) brightness(.78);opacity:.25}
    .stamp-card.locked:after{
      content:attr(data-lock);
      position:absolute;inset:0;display:grid;place-items:center;
      color:#5d5142;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.14em;
      background:linear-gradient(140deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.18));
    }
    .stamp-card.loading:before{
      content:"";position:absolute;inset:9px;
      background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(97,82,62,.07),rgba(255,255,255,.3),rgba(97,82,62,.07));
      background-size:200% 100%;animation:stampLoad 1.5s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes stampLoad{to{background-position:-200% 0}}
    .stamp-caption{
      display:block;
      max-width:145px;margin-top:7px;
      color:#5d5245;
      font:9px/1.2 var(--serif);
      overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .page-number{
      position:absolute;bottom:12px;z-index:5;
      color:#766a59;font:italic 11px var(--serif);
    }
    .book-page.left .page-number{left:24px}
    .book-page.right .page-number{right:24px}
    .album-nav{
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:17px;margin-top:18px;
    }
    .album-nav button{
      width:45px;height:45px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);border-radius:50%;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:var(--paper);
    }
    .album-nav button:disabled{opacity:.25;cursor:not-allowed}
    .album-nav span{min-width:100px;text-align:center;color:#b8afa3;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.18em}
    .flip-sheet{
      display:none;
      position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:50%;width:50%;z-index:12;
      transform-style:preserve-3d;transform-origin:left center;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .flip-sheet.turn-next{display:block;animation:flipNext .95s var(--ease) both}
    .flip-sheet.turn-prev{display:block;left:0;transform-origin:right center;animation:flipPrev .95s var(--ease) both}
    .flip-face{
      position:absolute;inset:0;backface-visibility:hidden;
      border:1px solid #ad9674;
      background:linear-gradient(138deg,#e5d4b6,#c7b18d);
      box-shadow:-22px 13px 42px rgba(48,31,17,.22);
    }
    .flip-face.back{transform:rotateY(180deg);background:linear-gradient(220deg,#ccb894,#eadcc1)}
    @keyframes flipNext{from{transform:rotateY(0)}to{transform:rotateY(-180deg)}}
    @keyframes flipPrev{from{transform:rotateY(0)}to{transform:rotateY(180deg)}}

    /* Map and culture */
    .journey-layout{
      position:relative;z-index:2;
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(400px,1fr) minmax(360px,.9fr);
      gap:35px;min-height:560px;margin-top:24px;
    }
    .map-wrap{
      position:relative;display:grid;place-items:center;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:30px;
      background:radial-gradient(circle at 45% 45%,rgba(97,139,140,.18),transparent 42%),rgba(255,255,255,.045);
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .italy-map{width:min(100%,560px);height:min(64vh,680px);overflow:visible}
    .region{fill:rgba(225,216,199,.1);stroke:rgba(231,223,208,.56);stroke-width:.55;transition:.7s}
    .region.unlocked{fill:rgba(142,168,139,.4);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 9px rgba(172,205,164,.43))}
    .region.focus{fill:rgba(222,178,107,.74);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 17px rgba(236,190,117,.75));animation:regionGlow 2.2s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes regionGlow{50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 25px rgba(236,190,117,.95))}}
    .city-point{cursor:pointer}.city-point .core{fill:#d4b071;stroke:#f4ead9;stroke-width:1}
    .city-point.locked .core{fill:#746f68}.city-point .pulse{fill:none;stroke:#d4b071;stroke-width:1;animation:mapPulse 2.2s infinite}
    .city-point.locked .pulse{stroke:#9d968d}.city-point text{fill:#eee8dd;font-size:8px;paint-order:stroke;stroke:#25231f;stroke-width:2px}
    @keyframes mapPulse{0%{r:4;opacity:.8}100%{r:14;opacity:0}}
    .map-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
    .lamp{
      width:max-content;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);border-radius:30px;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:#eee8dd;padding:11px 16px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.14em;
    }
    .lamp i{display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#d7af6e;margin-right:9px;box-shadow:0 0 16px #d7af6e}
    .map-info h3{font:400 clamp(39px,4vw,60px) var(--serif);margin:12px 0}
    .map-info p{color:#cfc6ba;font-size:13px;line-height:1.8}
    .city-effect{min-height:94px;margin:14px 0;padding:19px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:#bfb6aa;font-size:11px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .city-effect:before{content:attr(data-symbol);position:absolute;right:20px;top:6px;font-size:61px;opacity:.35;animation:floatSymbol 3s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes floatSymbol{50%{transform:translateY(-8px) rotate(3deg)}}
    .journey-meter div{height:5px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);overflow:hidden}
    .journey-meter i{display:block;height:100%;width:var(--p);background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8da088,#d7af6e);transition:.7s}
    .journey-meter small{display:block;margin-top:9px;color:#aaa297;font-size:9px}
    .map-wrap.lights-off .region.unlocked{fill:rgba(225,216,199,.06);filter:none}
    .map-wrap.lights-off .city-point .pulse{animation:none;opacity:0}

    .culture-head{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:28px}
    .guide-greeting{
      max-width:570px;padding:18px 22px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);border-radius:23px 23px 23px 5px;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.075);color:#e7dfd2;font:18px/1.55 var(--serif);
    }
    .culture-cats{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:28px 0 20px}
    .culture-cats button{
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
      color:#ccc4b8;padding:9px 14px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.11em;
    }
    .culture-cats button.on,.culture-cats button:hover{background:#e6d8be;color:#3c342b;transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .culture-path{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:14px}
    .culture-card{
      position:relative;min-height:300px;overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);border-radius:24px;background:#282520;color:#f2eadf;text-align:left;padding:0;
      opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);animation:cultureUp .58s forwards;animation-delay:calc(var(--i) * 80ms);
    }
    @keyframes cultureUp{to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
    .culture-card img{width:100%;height:175px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.55) saturate(.72);transition:.5s}
    .culture-card:hover img{filter:brightness(.84) saturate(.95);transform:scale(1.05)}
    .culture-card div{padding:15px}.culture-card small{color:#b9b0a4;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.14em}
    .culture-card b{display:block;margin-top:8px;font:400 19px var(--serif)}
    .culture-card.locked:after{content:"◇";position:absolute;right:13px;top:13px;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(18,17,15,.74)}

    /* Drawers and modals */
    .drawer{
      position:fixed;z-index:100;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;
      width:min(420px,91vw);padding:28px;
      color:#312b24;background:rgba(241,233,219,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
      transform:translateX(-105%);transition:.4s var(--ease);
      box-shadow:25px 0 80px rgba(0,0,0,.28);overflow:auto;
    }
    .drawer.open{transform:none}
    .drawer header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
    .drawer h2{font:400 34px var(--serif);margin:29px 0 20px}
    .drawer-close,.modal-close{border:0;background:transparent;font-size:25px;color:inherit}
    .library-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:12px 0;border-top:1px solid #cbbfab}
    .library-open{min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;border:0;background:transparent;text-align:left;color:#3c352c;font-size:11px}
    .library-edit,.library-remove{width:31px;height:31px;border:1px solid #c7baa5;border-radius:50%;background:transparent;color:#756a5c;font-size:10px}
    .empty-library{color:#817668;font-size:11px}
    .scrim{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:90;border:0;background:rgba(12,11,10,.54);backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
    .scrim.open{display:block}
    .modal{
      display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:120;
      padding:24px;place-items:center;
      background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 45%,rgba(72,60,46,.18),rgba(10,9,8,.82));
      backdrop-filter:blur(17px);
    }
    .modal.open{display:grid}
    .rename-card{
      width:min(560px,94vw);padding:31px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);border-radius:29px;
      color:var(--paper);background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(45,39,32,.95),rgba(25,23,20,.97));
      box-shadow:0 35px 110px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      animation:renameEnter .62s var(--ease) both;
    }
    @keyframes renameEnter{
      0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px) scale(.92)}
      58%{transform:translateY(-4px) scale(1.01)}
      100%{opacity:1;transform:none}
    }
    .rename-card header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
    .media-ticket{
      margin:23px 0 17px;padding:13px 16px;
      border:1px dashed rgba(235,205,151,.34);border-radius:15px;
      color:#b9afa2;background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);font-size:9px;
      overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .rename-card label{display:block;color:#b6ad9f;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.2em}
    .rename-card input{
      width:100%;margin-top:9px;padding:15px 16px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);border-radius:15px;
      color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);font:21px var(--serif);
    }
    .modal-actions{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-top:20px}
    .modal-actions button{
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:19px;
      color:#ddd3c5;background:transparent;padding:10px 16px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.12em;
    }
    .modal-actions .primary{color:#322a20;background:var(--paper);border-color:var(--paper)}
    .preview-card{
      width:min(860px,95vw);min-height:570px;
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:34px;
      color:var(--paper);background:linear-gradient(145deg,#29241e,#171512);
      box-shadow:0 40px 120px rgba(0,0,0,.58);
    }
    .preview-image{
      display:grid;place-items:center;min-height:570px;padding:46px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 48%,rgba(239,220,181,.24),transparent 35%),
        linear-gradient(140deg,rgba(255,255,255,.06),transparent);
    }
    .preview-image img{max-width:82%;max-height:410px;filter:drop-shadow(0 24px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.38))}
    .preview-copy{position:relative;padding:52px 45px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
    .preview-copy .modal-close{position:absolute;right:24px;top:20px;color:#ddd4c7}
    .preview-copy h3{font:400 clamp(32px,4vw,52px)/1.02 var(--serif);margin:13px 0 18px}
    .preview-copy p{color:#c3baad;font-size:13px;line-height:1.8}
    .preview-meta{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:8px 0 20px}
    .preview-meta span{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:16px;padding:7px 10px;color:#aba296;font-size:8px}
    .immersive-button{width:max-content;border:0;border-radius:21px;background:var(--paper);color:#302a22;padding:12px 17px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.13em}
    .immersive{
      display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:140;
      background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 48%,#3b3125 0,#171411 48%,#080706 100%);
      place-items:center;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .immersive.open{display:grid}
    .immersive:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle,transparent 16%,rgba(0,0,0,.7) 76%);pointer-events:none;z-index:2}
    .immersive-close{position:absolute;right:25px;top:20px;z-index:8;width:45px;height:45px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.23);border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:#fff;font-size:21px}
    .immersive-stage{position:relative;z-index:3;width:min(86vw,760px);height:min(78vh,690px);display:grid;place-items:center}
    .immersive-stage>img{max-width:78%;max-height:75%;filter:drop-shadow(0 35px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.55));transition:filter .3s}
    .magnifier{
      position:absolute;width:190px;height:190px;border-radius:50%;
      display:none;pointer-events:none;
      border:4px solid rgba(247,233,205,.8);
      box-shadow:0 20px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.5),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(61,43,22,.45);
      background-repeat:no-repeat;background-color:#d8c4a3;
      z-index:5;
    }
    .magnifier:after{
      content:"";position:absolute;right:-45px;bottom:-17px;width:70px;height:13px;border-radius:10px;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,#b89156,#513a24);transform:rotate(43deg);transform-origin:left;
    }
    .immersive-note{
      position:absolute;left:30px;bottom:24px;z-index:6;max-width:360px;
      color:#bdb2a3;font-size:10px;line-height:1.6;
    }
    .dialog-card{
      width:min(760px,95vw);padding:34px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:31px;
      background:linear-gradient(145deg,#2b2823,#1b1a17);color:#eee7dc;
      box-shadow:0 34px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    }
    .dialog-card header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
    .dialog-card h2{font:400 37px var(--serif);margin:15px 0}
    .bubble{width:82%;padding:15px 18px;border-radius:20px 20px 20px 5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.085);font-size:13px;line-height:1.65;margin:15px 0}
    .bubble.you{margin-left:auto;border-radius:20px 20px 5px 20px;background:#ded0b6;color:#3d352d}
    .word-pills{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .word-pills span{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:15px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:10px}
    .dialog-done{display:block;margin:22px 0 0 auto;border:0;border-radius:20px;background:#9aaa94;color:#20241f;padding:11px 16px;font-size:9px}
    .toast{
      display:none;position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:24px;z-index:170;
      transform:translateX(-50%);padding:11px 17px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);
      border-radius:21px;background:rgba(26,23,20,.92);color:var(--paper);font-size:9px;
      box-shadow:0 14px 35px rgba(0,0,0,.32);backdrop-filter:blur(15px);
    }
    .source-credit{
      position:fixed;right:12px;bottom:8px;z-index:10;
      color:rgba(255,255,255,.42);font-size:6px;letter-spacing:.08em;
    }

    @media(max-width:1320px){
      .app{width:min(1220px,calc(100% - 30px))}
      .topbar{grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto}
      .main-nav{overflow-x:auto;justify-content:flex-start;scrollbar-width:none}
      .main-nav::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
      .nav-button{padding:12px 11px}
      .culture-path{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
      .stamp-grid{grid-auto-rows:132px;gap:14px 9px}
      .book{min-height:555px}
      .roman{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(var(--angle)) translateY(-215px) rotate(calc(-1 * var(--angle)))}
    }
    @media(max-width:920px){
      .app{width:calc(100% - 18px);padding-top:10px}
      .topbar{min-height:64px;padding:7px 9px;gap:8px}
      .brand-area{gap:2px}.library-button{display:none}
      .home-button{width:40px;height:40px}
      .language-switch button{padding:8px 7px}
      .add-button{display:none}
      .view{margin-top:10px;min-height:calc(100vh - 84px)}
      .glass-page{min-height:calc(100vh - 84px);border-radius:27px}
      .progress-layout,.time-layout,.journey-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .progress-layout{min-height:0}.curve-canvas{min-height:470px}
      .progress-ledger{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
      .ledger-block{min-height:150px;border-bottom:0;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);padding:18px}
      .time-layout{gap:10px}.time-dial{max-width:520px}
      .roman{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(var(--angle)) translateY(-210px) rotate(calc(-1 * var(--angle)))}
      .time-journal{padding-left:40px}
      .scene-heading h2{font-size:45px}.pocket-watch{transform:scale(.82);transform-origin:top right}
      .album-head{align-items:flex-start}.album-tools{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end}
      .book{grid-template-columns:1fr;min-height:0}
      .book:before{display:none}.book-page.left{border-radius:20px 20px 3px 3px}.book-page.right{border-radius:3px 3px 20px 20px}
      .flip-sheet{display:none!important}
      .culture-head{display:block}.guide-greeting{margin-top:20px}
      .preview-card{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-height:92vh;overflow:auto}
      .preview-image{min-height:350px}.preview-copy{padding:35px}
    }
    @media(max-width:640px){
      .topbar{grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;border-radius:19px}
      .main-nav{gap:1px}.nav-button{padding:10px 9px;font-size:7px}
      .language-switch{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
      .language-switch button{font-size:7px;padding:7px 5px}
      .page-pad,.scenes-page{padding:25px 18px}
      .page-title{font-size:38px}.page-copy{font-size:11px}
      .home-kicker{font-size:19px}.film-credit{display:none}
      .player-page{padding:10px}.stage{border-radius:20px}
      .stage-tools{right:8px;top:8px}.tool{padding:0 9px}
      .media-title{font-size:15px}.control-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1.6fr auto;gap:7px}
      .segment-row{gap:3px}.nudge{width:25px;height:25px}
      .progress-layout{margin-top:25px}.curve-canvas{min-height:410px;padding:24px 18px}
      .curve-label{font-size:14px}.progress-ledger{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .ledger-block{border-right:0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);min-height:120px}
      .time-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.time-dial{width:100%}
      .roman{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(var(--angle)) translateY(-42vw) rotate(calc(-1 * var(--angle)));font-size:9px}
      .time-journal{padding:15px 0 15px 32px}.time-quote{font-size:24px}
      .scene-header{grid-template-columns:1fr}.pocket-watch{position:absolute;right:-25px;top:-12px;transform:scale(.62)}
      .scene-heading{padding-right:90px}.scene-heading h2{font-size:36px}
      .scene-gallery{margin-top:15px}
      .album-head{display:block}.album-tools{margin-top:15px;align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:row}
      .book-page{padding:25px 16px}.stamp-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-auto-rows:122px;gap:12px 4px}
      .stamp-card.portrait{width:70px;height:98px}.stamp-card.landscape{width:93px;height:70px}.stamp-card.square{width:80px;height:80px}.stamp-card.tall{width:64px;height:100px}
      .stamp-caption{font-size:7px;max-width:92px}
      .map-wrap{min-height:470px}.italy-map{height:450px}
      .culture-path{display:flex;overflow-x:auto}.culture-card{min-width:220px}
      .preview-image{min-height:300px;padding:30px}.preview-copy h3{font-size:34px}
      .magnifier{width:135px;height:135px}.source-credit{display:none}
    }
    /* V7 · one scene, one atmosphere */
    :root{
      --serif:"Bodoni 72","Didot","Iowan Old Style","Baskerville",serif;
      --scene-accent:#d9b675;--scene-accent-2:#8ea59b;
      --scene-line:rgba(231,207,161,.34);--scene-panel:rgba(15,14,12,.36);
      --scene-image:none;
    }
    body{background:#11100e}
    .backdrop{z-index:0;filter:saturate(.9) contrast(1.025) brightness(.91)}
    .backdrop:after{background:linear-gradient(105deg,rgba(9,9,8,.46),rgba(13,12,11,.16) 52%,rgba(9,9,8,.34)),linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(8,8,7,.34),transparent 62%,rgba(8,8,7,.08))}
    body[data-view="home"] .backdrop.on{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);animation:sceneCinema 24s ease-in-out infinite alternate}
    @keyframes sceneCinema{from{transform:scale(1.015) translate3d(-.35%,0,0)}to{transform:scale(1.075) translate3d(.8%,-.6%,0)}}
    .home-film{display:none!important}
    .glass-page{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(17,16,14,.2),rgba(10,10,9,.075))!important;border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-line) 82%,transparent);backdrop-filter:blur(9px) saturate(.96);box-shadow:0 30px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.2),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.045)}
    .glass-page:before{background:linear-gradient(125deg,rgba(255,255,255,.035),transparent 30%,rgba(255,255,255,.008));opacity:.58}
    .progress-page,.time-page,.album-page{background:transparent!important}
    .page-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-.045em}

    /* home ritual */
    .home-view{min-height:calc(100vh - 116px)}
    .home-content{width:min(760px,94vw);margin-top:-24px}
    .fountain-ritual{position:relative;width:min(620px,92vw);height:min(520px,66vh);margin:auto;display:grid;place-items:center}
    .fountain-water{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(219,193,142,.14))}
    .water-arc{fill:none;stroke:url(#waterGlow);stroke-width:1.05;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-dasharray:2 8;animation:fountainFlow 3.9s linear infinite}
    .water-arc.arc-two,.water-arc.arc-four{animation-delay:-1.2s}.water-arc.arc-three{animation-delay:-2.4s}
    .water-drops{fill:var(--scene-accent);animation:dropsBreathe 2.4s ease-in-out infinite}
    .fountain-line,.fountain-ripple{fill:none;stroke:rgba(245,235,217,.72);stroke-width:1.15;stroke-linecap:round}
    .fountain-ripple{stroke:var(--scene-accent-2);stroke-dasharray:3 9;animation:rippleMove 4s linear infinite}
    @keyframes fountainFlow{to{stroke-dashoffset:-150}}
    @keyframes dropsBreathe{50%{opacity:.28;transform:translateY(5px)}}
    @keyframes rippleMove{to{stroke-dashoffset:120}}
    .fountain-words{position:absolute;top:58px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:100%;font:400 clamp(25px,3vw,42px)/1 var(--serif);font-style:italic;letter-spacing:.025em;color:#f7efe2;text-shadow:0 8px 35px rgba(0,0,0,.72);animation:wordsMist 5.5s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes wordsMist{50%{letter-spacing:.045em;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 13px rgba(228,207,166,.32));transform:translate(-50%,-5px)}}
    .fountain-ritual .import-main{position:absolute;top:239px;width:92px;height:92px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(250,239,217,.72);background:rgba(17,16,14,.34);color:#fff;backdrop-filter:blur(15px);font:200 34px var(--sans);box-shadow:0 0 0 11px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}
    .fountain-ritual .import-main:hover{transform:scale(1.08) rotate(90deg);background:rgba(227,206,166,.15);box-shadow:0 0 0 18px rgba(227,206,166,.045),0 24px 58px rgba(0,0,0,.36)}
    .fountain-ritual .import-caption{position:absolute;top:348px;margin:0;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.42em}
    .home-scene-note{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:9px;margin-top:-26px;color:rgba(240,230,214,.62);font:italic 12px var(--serif);letter-spacing:.08em}
    .home-scene-note i{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--scene-accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(220,184,115,.07);animation:scenePulse 2.8s ease-in-out infinite}
    .home-petal,.daily-word{display:none!important}
    .film-credit{color:rgba(255,255,255,.34)}
    .drawer{width:min(500px,94vw);padding:31px 30px;color:var(--paper);background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(12,11,10,.76),rgba(18,16,13,.48));border-right:1px solid var(--scene-line);backdrop-filter:blur(21px) saturate(.95);box-shadow:25px 0 90px rgba(0,0,0,.32),inset -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.035)}
    .drawer:before{content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;background-image:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(9,8,7,.24),rgba(9,8,7,.07)),var(--scene-image);background-size:cover;background-position:center;opacity:.26;filter:saturate(.75)}
    .drawer h2{color:#f2e9dc;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-.035em}.drawer-close{color:#ded4c6}
    .library-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:48px minmax(0,1fr) auto;align-items:center;gap:13px;margin:9px 0;padding:13px 13px 13px 11px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.105);border-radius:19px;background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(255,255,255,.055),rgba(255,255,255,.014));backdrop-filter:blur(7px);transition:transform .45s var(--ease),border-color .45s ease,background .45s ease}
    .library-item:hover{transform:translateX(5px);border-color:var(--scene-line);background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(255,255,255,.085),rgba(255,255,255,.018))}
    .library-kind{width:42px;height:42px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--scene-accent);font:italic 17px var(--serif);box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,.018)}
    .library-open{min-width:0;display:block;overflow:visible;white-space:normal;border:0;background:transparent;text-align:left;color:#eee4d6;padding:0}
    .library-open strong{display:block;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font:400 17px/1.2 var(--serif);letter-spacing:-.015em}
    .library-open small{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-top:6px;color:#aaa095;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.11em;text-transform:uppercase}
    .library-open small i{width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--scene-accent);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--scene-accent)}
    .library-listen-line{display:block;width:100%;height:1px;margin-top:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);overflow:hidden}
    .library-listen-line b{display:block;height:100%;width:var(--listened,0%);background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--scene-accent-2),var(--scene-accent));box-shadow:0 0 9px var(--scene-accent)}
    .library-actions{display:flex;gap:5px}.library-edit,.library-remove,.library-resume{width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:#bcb2a5;font-size:9px;transition:.35s var(--ease)}
    .library-resume{color:#efe4d4;border-color:var(--scene-line)}.library-edit:hover,.library-remove:hover,.library-resume:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
    .empty-library{color:#aaa095}.scrim{background:rgba(9,8,7,.25);backdrop-filter:blur(7px)}
    .ripple-ritual{position:relative;width:min(640px,92vw);height:min(520px,66vh);margin:auto;display:grid;place-items:center;isolation:isolate}
    .ripple-motto{position:absolute;top:66px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:100%;text-align:center;font:italic 400 clamp(25px,3vw,42px)/1 var(--serif);letter-spacing:.025em;color:#f7efe2;text-shadow:0 8px 35px rgba(0,0,0,.66);animation:wordsMist 5.5s ease-in-out infinite}
    .ripple-field{position:absolute;left:50%;top:55%;width:270px;height:170px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(204,225,220,.14))}
    .ripple-field i{--delay:0s;position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:104px;height:52px;border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent-2) 72%,rgba(255,255,255,.25));border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.58);opacity:0;animation:waterRipple 4.6s var(--ease) infinite;animation-delay:var(--delay)}
    .ripple-field i:nth-child(2){--delay:-.92s}.ripple-field i:nth-child(3){--delay:-1.84s}.ripple-field i:nth-child(4){--delay:-2.76s}.ripple-field i:nth-child(5){--delay:-3.68s}
    .ripple-field:before,.ripple-field:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none}
    .ripple-field:before{width:176px;height:72px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,255,255,.055),transparent 68%);filter:blur(5px);animation:waterSurface 4.8s ease-in-out infinite}
    .ripple-field:after{width:9px;height:9px;background:rgba(245,235,217,.72);box-shadow:0 0 19px var(--scene-accent),0 0 42px rgba(255,255,255,.2);animation:waterDrop 3.3s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes waterRipple{0%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.52)}16%{opacity:.65}78%,100%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2.35)}}
    @keyframes waterSurface{50%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.08);opacity:.55}}
    @keyframes waterDrop{0%,44%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-48px) scale(.55);opacity:0}52%{opacity:.8}66%{transform:translate(-50%,-4px) scale(.8);opacity:.9}74%{transform:translate(-50%,0) scale(.25);opacity:0}}
    .ripple-import{position:absolute;left:50%;top:55%;z-index:3;width:96px;height:96px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(250,239,217,.62);background:radial-gradient(circle at 38% 28%,rgba(255,255,255,.11),rgba(17,16,14,.24) 58%,rgba(11,10,9,.38));color:#fff;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 9px rgba(255,255,255,.018),0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.25),0 0 0 14px rgba(255,255,255,.018);transition:transform .75s var(--ease),background .55s ease,box-shadow .55s ease}
    .ripple-import span{display:block;font:200 34px/1 var(--sans);transition:transform .8s var(--ease),opacity .45s ease;opacity:.86}
    .ripple-import:hover{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.075);background:rgba(226,207,169,.13);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 9px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 22px 58px rgba(0,0,0,.28),0 0 0 21px rgba(218,195,151,.04)}
    .ripple-import:hover span{transform:rotate(90deg);opacity:1}
    .ripple-caption{position:absolute;left:50%;top:calc(55% + 82px);transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.42em;color:rgba(244,235,220,.72);white-space:nowrap}

    /* compact transparent player */
    .player-page{min-height:calc(100vh - 112px);padding:18px 20px;color:var(--paper);background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(14,13,11,.16),rgba(14,13,11,.055))!important}
    .media-head{margin:0 2px 11px}.media-title{color:var(--cream);font:400 clamp(18px,1.65vw,25px) var(--serif);letter-spacing:-.015em}.media-duration{color:#b9b0a3}.rename-mini{color:#d9d0c3;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-color:var(--scene-line)}
    .player-shell{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 250px;gap:17px;align-items:start}
    .player-main{min-width:0}.stage{aspect-ratio:16/9;max-height:58vh;border-radius:22px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);background-image:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(8,8,7,.36),rgba(8,8,7,.16)),var(--scene-image);background-size:cover;background-position:center;box-shadow:0 20px 65px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
    .stage video{background:transparent;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.25))}
    .stage-center{width:54px;height:54px;background:rgba(17,16,14,.42);color:#fff;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.66);box-shadow:0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.28)}
    .timeline-block{padding:11px 4px 0;color:#e7ded0}.timeline-time{color:#aaa194}.timeline-base{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.29)}.timeline-selection{height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--scene-accent-2),var(--scene-accent));box-shadow:0 0 14px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 35%,transparent)}
    .gelato-cursor{top:4px;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(.72);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(238,208,150,.35))}.gelato-cursor i{width:18px;height:13px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--scene-accent);border-radius:60% 60% 45% 45%}.gelato-cursor b{margin:-1px auto;border-left:5px solid transparent;border-right:5px solid transparent;border-top:12px solid transparent;position:relative}.gelato-cursor b:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:-5px;top:-12px;width:10px;height:12px;clip-path:polygon(0 0,100% 0,50% 100%);background:linear-gradient(135deg,transparent 43%,var(--scene-accent) 45% 52%,transparent 54%)}
    .trim-range input::-webkit-slider-thumb{width:17px;height:17px;background:rgba(16,15,13,.85);border:1px solid var(--scene-accent-2);box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(255,255,255,.025)}.trim-range input:last-child::-webkit-slider-thumb{border-color:var(--scene-accent)}
    .segment-row{grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;gap:10px}.segment-side{color:#d7cfc3}.segment-side label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}.time-entry{width:79px;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);background:transparent;color:var(--cream);font:400 14px var(--serif);text-align:center;padding:5px 3px}.time-entry.invalid{border-color:#c7766a;color:#e5a098;animation:fieldShake .32s ease}@keyframes fieldShake{25%{transform:translateX(-3px)}75%{transform:translateX(3px)}}.nudge{width:25px;height:25px;color:#ddd4c7;border-color:var(--scene-line);background:rgba(255,255,255,.035)}.segment-length{display:block;text-align:center;margin-top:-3px;color:#8f877c}.transport{margin:0;gap:6px}.transport button{width:39px;height:39px;color:#d2c8ba}.transport .play{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-color:var(--scene-line)}
    .player-side{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:22px;background:rgba(14,13,11,.3);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);min-height:100%}
    .mind-clear-button{display:grid;grid-template-columns:42px 1fr;gap:10px;align-items:center;width:100%;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(255,255,255,.065),rgba(255,255,255,.015));color:#eee4d6;text-align:left}.mind-clear-button>i{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);color:var(--scene-accent);font-style:normal}.mind-clear-button b{display:block;font:400 15px var(--serif)}.mind-clear-button small{display:block;margin-top:3px;color:#9f978c;font-size:7px;line-height:1.4;letter-spacing:.04em}.mind-clear-button.ready{animation:envelopeBreath 2.6s ease-in-out 3}@keyframes envelopeBreath{50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(218,184,118,.055);transform:translateY(-2px)}}
    .player-side .control-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:15px;padding:13px 3px;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}.player-side .control-row small{color:var(--scene-accent-2)}.player-side .control-row select{width:100%;padding:7px 0;color:#eee4d6;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)}.player-side .loop-buttons{flex-wrap:wrap}.player-side .loop-buttons button{color:#d8d0c4;background:rgba(255,255,255,.025)}.player-side .loop-buttons button.on{background:var(--scene-accent);color:#1b1814}.player-side .loop-count{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:6px;color:#afa69a}.player-side .loop-count small{margin-right:auto}.player-side .loop-count b{color:var(--cream)}.player-side .study-mode{width:100%;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;margin:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}.player-side .study-mode button{padding:8px 5px;color:#bfb5a8;font-size:7px}.player-side .study-mode button.on{background:rgba(242,234,220,.9);color:#27231e}.player-side .learning-panel{padding:11px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-color:var(--scene-line);color:#e9e0d3}.player-side .save-clip{margin:auto 0 0;width:100%;color:#d9d0c4;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
    .audio-cover{width:100%;height:100%;aspect-ratio:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:34px;background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(8,8,7,.35),rgba(255,255,255,.035));border:0;box-shadow:none;transform:none}.vinyl-disc{position:relative;width:170px;height:170px;border-radius:50%;background:repeating-radial-gradient(circle,#171615 0 3px,#282522 4px 5px);box-shadow:0 20px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.38);animation:vinylSpin 16s linear infinite paused}.stage:has(audio:not([data-paused])) .vinyl-disc{animation-play-state:running}.vinyl-disc:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:48px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,#1b1917 0 8px,var(--scene-accent) 9px 34px,#e9dcc5 35px 36px,var(--scene-accent) 37px)}.vinyl-disc i{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:#171512;z-index:2}.vinyl-disc b{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;z-index:3;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font:8px var(--sans);color:#201d18}@keyframes vinylSpin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}.vinyl-copy span{display:block;color:var(--scene-accent-2);font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.24em}.vinyl-copy strong{display:block;margin-top:9px;max-width:260px;font:400 28px/1.05 var(--serif);color:#f2e8da}.player-page.audio-mode .stage{aspect-ratio:auto;min-height:230px;max-height:260px}.player-page.audio-mode #audioWorkbench{display:block}.player-page.audio-mode .stage-center{left:auto;right:30px}.audio-workbench{display:none;margin-top:12px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:20px;background:rgba(13,12,11,.28)}.audio-workbench header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:15px}.audio-workbench h3{margin:4px 0 0;font:400 22px var(--serif)}.audio-workbench header button,.transcript-actions button,.dictation-pane button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:#d8cfc2;padding:8px 11px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.08em}.transcript-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;margin-top:11px}.transcript-grid label{display:block;margin-bottom:6px;color:#afa69a;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.18em}.transcript-grid textarea{width:100%;height:95px;resize:vertical;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(5,5,4,.22);color:#eee5d8;padding:11px;font:13px/1.6 var(--sans)}.source-pane.concealed textarea{filter:blur(8px);pointer-events:none;user-select:none}.transcript-actions{margin-top:6px}.dictation-result{margin-top:7px;color:#bdb4a7;font-size:9px;line-height:1.5}.dictation-result strong{color:var(--scene-accent);font:400 18px var(--serif)}

    /* audio atelier · an original ribbon phonograph */
    .audio-cover{position:relative;isolation:isolate;display:block;overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 38%,rgba(255,255,255,.07),transparent 37%),linear-gradient(155deg,rgba(7,7,7,.78),rgba(12,11,10,.42));border-radius:26px}
    .audio-phone{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:27px 24px 23px}
    .vinyl-stage{position:relative;width:min(310px,88%);aspect-ratio:1;margin-top:-18px;display:grid;place-items:center;filter:drop-shadow(0 24px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.42))}
    .vinyl-disc{position:relative;z-index:3;width:78%;height:78%;border-radius:50%;background:repeating-radial-gradient(circle at center,#111 0 2px,#242321 3px 4px,#171614 5px 7px);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.16),inset 0 0 34px rgba(255,255,255,.035),0 20px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.42);animation:vinylSpin 13s linear infinite paused}
    .vinyl-disc:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:5%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:50%;background:none}
    .vinyl-art{position:absolute;inset:27%;border-radius:50%;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(22,18,14,.12),rgba(22,18,14,.12)),var(--scene-image);background-size:cover;background-position:center;box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(244,237,226,.88),0 0 0 9px rgba(255,255,255,.18);filter:saturate(.82) contrast(1.04)}
    .vinyl-disc i{width:7px;height:7px;background:#171512;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,235,217,.7)}.vinyl-disc b{font-size:6px;color:#eee3d1;letter-spacing:.14em;text-shadow:0 1px 8px #000}
    .lace-ribbon{position:absolute;z-index:4;left:-5%;right:-5%;height:46px;border:1px solid rgba(247,246,242,.36);border-left-color:transparent;border-right-color:transparent;border-radius:50%;opacity:.62;filter:blur(.25px) drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,.12));transform:rotate(var(--r));animation:ribbonFloat 7s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none}
    .lace-ribbon:before,.lace-ribbon:after{content:"";position:absolute;top:50%;width:44%;height:30px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.26);border-radius:50%;transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(10deg)}
    .lace-ribbon:before{left:4%}.lace-ribbon:after{right:4%;transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(-10deg)}
    .lace-ribbon.one{--r:-16deg;top:15%}.lace-ribbon.two{--r:19deg;bottom:13%;animation-delay:-3.5s}
    @keyframes ribbonFloat{50%{transform:rotate(calc(var(--r) + 4deg)) translateY(-7px) scaleX(1.04);opacity:.82}}
    .tone-arm{position:absolute;z-index:6;right:5%;top:2%;width:19%;height:53%;border-right:5px solid rgba(236,236,232,.78);border-radius:0 28px 30px 0;transform:rotate(-8deg);transform-origin:top right;filter:drop-shadow(0 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.4));transition:transform 1.1s var(--ease)}
    .tone-arm:before{content:"";position:absolute;right:-10px;top:-5px;width:15px;height:15px;border-radius:50%;background:#e9e8e2;box-shadow:0 0 0 7px rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
    .tone-arm:after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-8px;bottom:-3px;width:15px;height:22px;border-radius:4px;background:#e5e3de;transform:rotate(-5deg)}
    .stage:has(audio:not([data-paused])) .vinyl-disc{animation-play-state:running}.stage:has(audio:not([data-paused])) .tone-arm{transform:rotate(5deg)}
    .vinyl-copy{position:absolute;left:24px;right:24px;bottom:22px;text-align:left;z-index:7}.vinyl-copy span{color:var(--scene-accent);font-size:7px}.vinyl-copy strong{max-width:80%;font-size:25px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
    .player-page.audio-mode .player-shell{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 225px}
    .player-page.audio-mode .player-main{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(310px,.72fr) minmax(400px,1.28fr);grid-template-areas:"audio-stage audio-work" "audio-time audio-work";gap:14px;align-items:stretch}
    .player-page.audio-mode .stage{grid-area:audio-stage;min-height:430px;max-height:450px;aspect-ratio:auto}.player-page.audio-mode .stage-tools,.player-page.audio-mode .mask-panel{display:none!important}.player-page.audio-mode .stage-center{left:50%;right:auto;top:auto;bottom:68px;width:45px;height:45px;transform:translateX(-50%)}
    .player-page.audio-mode .timeline-block{grid-area:audio-time;padding:10px 7px 0}.player-page.audio-mode #audioWorkbench{grid-area:audio-work;display:block;margin:0;min-height:100%}
    .audio-workbench{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(10,9,8,.24),rgba(255,255,255,.025));backdrop-filter:blur(11px);padding:24px;border-radius:26px}.audio-workbench h3{font-size:29px}.audio-workbench .transcript-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}.audio-workbench .transcript-grid textarea{height:155px;background:rgba(5,5,4,.16);border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-line) 72%,transparent)}
    @media(max-width:1100px){.player-page.audio-mode .player-main{grid-template-columns:minmax(280px,.8fr) minmax(330px,1.2fr)}.player-page.audio-mode .player-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}.player-page.audio-mode .player-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
    @media(max-width:760px){.player-page.audio-mode .player-main{display:block}.player-page.audio-mode .stage{min-height:430px}.player-page.audio-mode #audioWorkbench{margin-top:13px}.audio-workbench .transcript-grid textarea{height:125px}}

    /* real learning records */
    .progress-page{padding:clamp(28px,3.5vw,58px)}.record-head{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;gap:30px}.record-head .page-copy{max-width:630px}.record-range-label{padding:9px 13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);color:#d7cfc3;font:italic 14px var(--serif)}.record-filter-bar{position:relative;z-index:3;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:30px;margin:23px 0 18px;padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);border-radius:19px;background:rgba(8,8,7,.18)}.record-filter-group small{display:block;margin-bottom:7px;color:#9e968b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em}.record-pills{display:flex;gap:5px}.record-pills button{border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:15px;background:transparent;color:#bcb3a7;padding:7px 11px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.09em}.record-pills button:hover{border-color:var(--scene-line)}.record-pills button.on{background:rgba(239,229,211,.9);color:#24201b}.custom-dates{display:none;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-left:auto}.custom-dates.open{display:flex}.custom-dates input{color-scheme:dark;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);background:transparent;color:#ddd3c5;padding:6px;font-size:8px}.record-layout{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 220px;gap:16px}.record-chart-card{position:relative;min-height:470px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:28px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.055),rgba(255,255,255,.012));overflow:hidden;backdrop-filter:blur(11px)}.record-chart-top{position:absolute;left:25px;top:22px;z-index:3}.record-chart-top span{display:block;color:#9e968b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em}.record-chart-top strong{display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#f0e6d8;font:400 31px var(--serif)}.record-chart{position:absolute;inset:58px 18px 9px;width:calc(100% - 36px);height:calc(100% - 67px);overflow:visible}.record-grid path{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.075);stroke-width:1;stroke-dasharray:2 9}.record-area{fill:url(#recordAreaGradient)}.record-line-shadow{fill:none;stroke:rgba(0,0,0,.28);stroke-width:8;stroke-linecap:round}.record-line{fill:none;stroke:url(#recordGradient);stroke-width:1.6;stroke-linecap:round;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(224,190,126,.25));stroke-dasharray:1500;animation:recordDraw 1.35s var(--ease) both}@keyframes recordDraw{from{stroke-dashoffset:1500}to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}.record-dot{fill:#171512;stroke:var(--scene-accent);stroke-width:2}.record-dot-halo{fill:rgba(226,193,132,.08);animation:dotBreathe 2.6s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes dotBreathe{50%{r:15;opacity:0}}.record-axis text{fill:#9c9489;font:9px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.05em}.record-empty{display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;place-items:center;color:#a9a095;font:italic 17px var(--serif)}.record-empty.open{display:grid}.record-summary{display:grid;gap:12px}.record-summary article{min-height:132px;padding:19px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:23px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}.record-summary span{color:#9e968b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em}.record-summary strong{display:block;margin:8px 0 4px;color:#f1e7d8;font:400 35px var(--serif)}.record-summary small{color:#9d958a;font-size:8px;line-height:1.5}.balance-ring{position:relative;width:72px;height:72px;margin:10px 0 5px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center}.balance-ring i{position:absolute;inset:7px;border:1px dashed var(--scene-accent);border-radius:50%;animation:slowSpin 18s linear infinite}.balance-ring b{font:400 17px var(--serif);color:#ece2d3}

    /* study time breathing */
    .time-page{padding:clamp(30px,4vw,66px)}.time-layout{min-height:530px}.time-dial{filter:drop-shadow(0 28px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.26));animation:dialBreath 5s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes dialBreath{50%{transform:scale(1.018);filter:drop-shadow(0 28px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.32))}}.dial-track{stroke-width:.65}.dial-arc.today{stroke-width:1.15}.dial-arc.session{stroke-width:.85}.dial-arc.reward{stroke-width:.7}.dial-center strong{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:-.075em;text-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(242,226,197,.12)}.time-stat strong{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:-.045em}.time-journal{background:rgba(12,11,10,.12);border-radius:28px;padding-right:25px}.time-quote{font-weight:400}

    /* dramatic time path + skeleton watch */
    .scenes-page{padding:clamp(28px,3.4vw,56px)}.scene-header{grid-template-columns:1fr auto}.scene-heading .page-title{font-size:clamp(45px,5vw,76px);font-weight:300}.world-clocks{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:13px 18px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:22px;background:rgba(10,9,8,.18)}.world-clocks div{text-align:right}.world-clocks small{display:block;color:#9c9489;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.17em}.world-clocks b{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#efe5d6;font:300 22px var(--serif);letter-spacing:.02em}.world-clocks>i{width:1px;height:36px;background:var(--scene-line)}.scene-basis{position:relative;z-index:6;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin:20px 0 -8px;color:#aaa196;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.14em}.scene-basis>div{display:flex;gap:4px}.scene-basis button{border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:15px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:#b7aea2;padding:7px 10px;font-size:7px}.scene-basis button.on{border-color:var(--scene-line);color:#f1e6d6;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)}#customSceneTime{display:none;color-scheme:dark;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);background:transparent;color:#e6ddcf;padding:6px}#customSceneTime.open{display:block}.scene-gallery{margin-top:5px;padding:92px 12px 42px;min-height:610px;mask-image:none;overflow:visible}.scene-curve{top:4px;height:270px;min-width:1120px}.scene-curve path:first-child{stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.1);stroke-width:.8}.scene-curve path:last-child{stroke-width:1.25;stroke-dasharray:2 10;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(226,189,119,.25))}.scene-track{min-width:1120px;gap:5px;padding:155px 15px 30px;justify-content:space-between}.scene-card{--lift:0px;flex-basis:138px;border:0;border-radius:14px;padding:5px;background:rgba(7,7,6,.18);opacity:.28;filter:saturate(.7);box-shadow:none}.scene-card:nth-child(1){--lift:-48px;transform:rotate(-4deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(2){--lift:38px;transform:rotate(3deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(3){--lift:-6px;transform:rotate(-2deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(4){--lift:67px;transform:rotate(4deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(5){--lift:-27px;transform:rotate(-3deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(6){--lift:45px;transform:rotate(2deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(7){--lift:-38px;transform:rotate(4deg)}.scene-card:before{top:-58px;width:7px;height:7px}.scene-card img{height:150px;border-radius:10px}.scene-card b{font:300 17px var(--serif);color:#eee4d5}.scene-card.on{opacity:1;background:rgba(9,8,7,.24);transform:translateY(-18px) scale(1.23) rotate(0deg);border:0;box-shadow:0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 0 0 1px var(--scene-line)}.scene-card.on img{filter:brightness(.95) saturate(.92)}
    .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{position:absolute;left:50%;top:120px;z-index:8;width:108px;height:108px;margin:0;padding:0;border:0;border-radius:50%;background:transparent;color:#eadcc5;transition:left .8s var(--ease),top .8s var(--ease);filter:drop-shadow(0 14px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.45))}.watch-orbit .watch-face{position:absolute;inset:8px;width:auto;height:auto;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.72);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(10,9,8,.08) 0 19%,transparent 20% 43%,rgba(215,179,112,.08) 44% 46%,transparent 47%);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 7px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 0 0 3px rgba(16,14,11,.38),0 0 0 4px rgba(220,183,113,.42);color:#e5d6bd}.watch-orbit .watch-loop{position:absolute;left:44px;top:-11px;width:20px;height:17px;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.7);border-radius:50% 50% 20% 20%}.watch-orbit .watch-crown{position:absolute;left:48px;top:-18px;width:12px;height:7px;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.6
